steps.title: Decode the function parameters
steps.content:
The function $P(t) = 24.6(1.038)^t$ has:
  • Input $t$ = years after 1987
  • Output $P(t)$ = population in millions

steps.title: Interpret the value $P(7) = 31.94$
steps.content:
The statement $P(7) \approx 31.94$ means that when $t = 7$, the population is 31.94 million.

Since $t = 7$ corresponds to 7 years after 1987, we conclude: 7 years after 1987, the predicted population is approximately 31.94 million. That matches Choice C — $7$ years after $1987$, the predicted population of this country was approximately $31.94$ million..
